description: The 'Ndrina Trimboli is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta, originating from Platì, Calabria, Italy. It has been active since the 1960s in Australia and since the 1970s in Volpiano, Turin, where it is allied with the Marando and Agresta families. The group has been involved in international drug trafficking, particularly between Italy and Australia, and has faced numerous arrests and operations against it.

country_links.evidence_quote: Domenico Trimboli , nato a Buenos Aires ( Argentina
country_links.context: A member of the 'Ndrina Trimboli was born in Buenos Aires, Argentina, indicating the organization's presence there.

country_links.evidence_quote: Si trovano fin dagli anni '70 nel comune di Volpiano ... e dagli anni '60 in Australia .
country_links.context: The 'Ndrina Trimboli has been present in Australia since the 1960s and was involved in drug trafficking there in the 1970s and 1980s.

country_links.evidence_quote: Il 26 aprile 2013 viene arrestato a Medellín , in Colombia , il narcotrafficante Domenico Trimboli
country_links.context: A member of the 'Ndrina Trimboli was arrested in Colombia, indicating the organization's presence or activity there.
